name: wdk-wallet-web
description: Self-custodial multi-chain WDK wallet starter for the web (Next.js). Web counterpart to tetherto/wdk-starter-react-native.

scripts.//typecheck: The Next app type-checks against @wdk-web/wallet-core's emitted dist/*.d.ts (its package exports point at dist), so the core must be built before any consumer's tsc runs. pnpm -r build is topological; build the core first, then type-check the workspace.
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @wdk-web/wallet-core build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm build
scripts.//demo: Regenerate docs/demo.gif: builds the app, records create->backup->seed-quiz->portfolio->receive against the offline Electrum-WS fixture (no endpoint, no secret), encodes to gif. Prereqs: `corepack pnpm exec playwright install chromium` (one-time) and ffmpeg on PATH. Demo tooling lives in tools/, outside the pnpm workspace - never touched by lint/typecheck/test/build.
scripts.//smoke: Permanent E2E smoke: builds core + Next, serves the prod build on a free port, and drives a real browser through create -> seed-quiz -> portfolio -> receive copy a11y name -> Recovery Check. Network-independent (BTC left unconfigured). Prereq: `corepack pnpm exec playwright install chromium` (one-time).
scripts.//a11y: Accessibility audit: builds + serves the prod Next app and runs axe-core (WCAG 2.0/2.1 A+AA) against every key screen (onboarding, backup, seed quiz, portfolio, receive, settings). Audit browser uses bypassCSP so axe can inject; the app's strict CSP is unchanged and proven by smoke. Exits 1 on any violation >= A11Y_FAIL_ON (default serious; set =none for discovery). Tooling outside the workspace - never touched by lint/typecheck/test/build. Prereq: `corepack pnpm exec playwright install chromium`.
scripts.//btc:live: Live Bitcoin read: runs the REAL WDK Electrum-over-WebSocket adapter (in-process on Node) and reads an on-chain balance over a live endpoint, proving the genuine BTC transport that pnpm test (FakeWdkAdapter) and pnpm smoke (BTC unconfigured) cannot. Network-dependent and opt-in: it lives outside the workspace so vitest never collects it and verify stays offline. Defaults to the genesis coinbase address on mainnet (balance only grows, can't flake); override via BTC_LIVE_WS_URL / BTC_LIVE_NETWORK / BTC_LIVE_ADDRESS / BTC_LIVE_MIN_SATS. Requires the core to be built first (corepack pnpm --filter @wdk-web/wallet-core build).
